description: Triggers for product strategy: ICP, positioning, pricing, GTM motion, and strategic bets

queries.query: Help me build a 1-page product strategy canvas
Define our ICP and Anti-ICP for our B2B SaaS product
Run a Porter's 5 Forces analysis for our market
Should we go PLG or SLG? Help me think through our GTM motion
Develop our positioning statement vs our main competitors
Help me think through value metrics and pricing strategy
Create 3 strategic bets with hypotheses and kill criteria for next year
What moat opportunities exist for our product?
Map our Jobs to Be Done — functional, emotional, and social jobs
Our strategy is vague — help us make hard choices about what not to do
Set up weekly customer interviews and OST for discovery
Build a bet backlog and Now/Next/Later roadmap
Design a staged rollout for our next feature
Run a bet retrospective and decide scale/iterate/kill
Design team structure for my growing product org
Build agency-control tradeoffs for our LLM features
Help me write an executive resume for CPO roles
Create an ABX account-based marketing campaign
Use McKinsey structured analysis on our churn problem
Set up discovery rhythm and customer interview cadence
